datasetAgreementGeneral: This Kaplan-Meier survival curve model is developed for non-parametric survival analysis in cancer research. Access is restricted to qualified senior researchers with a background in biostatistics or oncology.
term1: You acknowledge that this model is designed exclusively for survival analysis and must not be used for clinical decisions without validation by a qualified medical professional.
term2: You agree not to use this model for any illegal, unethical, or harmful activities.
term3: You are required to provide proper attribution to the model developers in any publications, reports, or presentations.
term4: You accept that all outcomes based on results from this model are solely at your discretion and the developers disclaim any liability.
term5: You agree not to redistribute or share this model to third parties without explicit written permission from the developers.
